summary: Tool handlers are extracted to lib/tools modules and registry wiring is current.
Storage implementation is split behind a stable facade.
Account manager is a slim orchestrator over focused account modules.
Account removal requires confirm=true and guidance includes the confirmation argument.
Export overwrite defaults to force=false at the tool layer.
Help topic matching is exact rather than substring based.
Request transformer remains a large multi-domain module.
Fetch helpers combine retry, auth, rewrite, and error classification.
Largest storage modules may need future focused splits.
Branch coverage is below the aspirational 80 percent floor; executable thresholds are calibrated to current coverage.
Current-structure parity tests guard future drift.
